name: @prune/fleet-cache
description: F7 — fleet resolved-context cache. One developer's resolved repo-fact answer ("how our auth works") serves the whole team, gated by DEPENDENCY content-SHA freshness: a hit is served only when every dependency SHA the answer was derived from is unchanged; any drift makes it stale and evicts it. Deterministic SHA comparison; team-scoped (no cross-org); the answer is referenced by id (no content stored here). Delta vs f12 skill-library (which replays a procedure): F7 re-serves a finished answer across devs. No model call, no regex.
